hero.altText: Dragon speech recognition software professional dictation Australia doctor lawyer office
hero.prompt: Professional Australian doctor or lawyer dictating by voice into a computer, Dragon speech recognition software interface visible, modern clinical or legal office, teal and dark tones, confident and efficient

about-banner.altText: Voice Recognition Australia team 25 years Dragon speech recognition experience
about-banner.prompt: Australian enterprise technology team in a professional office, speech recognition software on screens, collaborative and expert environment, 25 years experience

feature-medical.altText: Dragon Medical One cloud speech recognition doctor hospital clinical documentation
feature-medical.prompt: Doctor using Dragon Medical One cloud speech recognition in a hospital or clinical setting, dictating patient notes hands-free, professional medical environment, teal accents

feature-professional.altText: Dragon Professional dictation software lawyer legal professional office voice to text
feature-professional.prompt: Legal or business professional using Dragon Professional speech recognition software, dictating documents by voice, modern office environment, productivity and efficiency theme

cta-banner.altText: Dragon speech recognition software authorised reseller Australia contact enquiry
cta-banner.prompt: Professional Australian business consultation, speech recognition technology discussion, trusted expert advisor, dark navy and teal tones, confident
